parameters.query: SELECT d.deal_id, d.company_name, d.salesforce_stage, d.deal_stage, d.deal_value_usd, d.close_date, d.forecast_category, d.deal_owner, dh.pain_score, dh.power_score, dh.vision_score, dh.value_score, dh.change_score, dh.control_score, dh.p2v2c2_total, dh.critical_activity_stage, dh.champion_name, dh.champion_title, dh.executive_sponsor_name, dh.executive_sponsor_title, dh.pe_sponsor_score, dh.dap_exists, dh.dap_agreed, dh.dap_status, dh.dap_milestones_complete, dh.dap_has_14_day_gap, dh.dap_next_milestone, dh.dap_next_milestone_date, dh.current_state_org, dh.current_state_activities, dh.current_state_technology, dh.future_state_org, dh.future_state_activities, dh.future_state_technology, dh.key_stakeholder_success_criteria, dh.risks, dh.next_step, dh.next_step_date, dh.call_summary, dh.services_narrative, dh.general_narrative, dh.scored_at FROM deals d LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT * FROM deal_health WHERE deal_id = d.deal_id ORDER BY scored_at DESC LIMIT 1 ) dh ON true WHERE d.deal_id = '{{ $('Code: Extract Inputs').first().json.deal_id }}' LIMIT 1

SELECT output_type, recipient_name, recipient_email, subject, content_summary, full_content, original_content, status, dismiss_reason, sent_at FROM outputs_log WHERE deal_id = '{{ $('Code: Extract Inputs').first().json.deal_id }}' ORDER BY sent_at DESC LIMIT 15
